mapper.select: select * from friend_group where user_id = #{userId} and system_flag = 1 order by id asc limit 1

select fg.id, fg.user_id, fg.group_name, fg.system_flag, fg.sort_order, fg.create_time, fg.update_time, count(fr.id) as friend_count from friend_group fg left join friend_relation fr on fr.user_id = fg.user_id and fr.group_id = fg.id where fg.user_id = #{userId} group by fg.id, fg.user_id, fg.group_name, fg.system_flag, fg.sort_order, fg.create_time, fg.update_time order by fg.system_flag desc, fg.sort_order asc, fg.id asc
select count(*) from friend_group where user_id = #{userId} and system_flag = 0
mapper.insert: insert into friend_group (user_id, group_name, system_flag, sort_order) values (#{userId}, #{groupName}, #{systemFlag}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: select fr.friend_user_id, u.user_no, u.nickname, coalesce(u.avatar_url, '') as avatar_url, case when coalesce(ups.allow_friend_view_profile, 1) = 1 then coalesce(up.bio, '') else '' end as bio, coalesce(ups.allow_friend_view_profile, 1) as allow_friend_view_profile, fr.group_id, coalesce(fg.group_name, 'Default') as group_name, case when tm_self.team_id is not null and tm_self.team_id = tm_friend.team_id then 1 else 0 end as same_team_flag from friend_relation fr inner join app_user u on u.id = fr.friend_user_id and u.status = 1 left join user_profile up on up.user_id = fr.friend_user_id left join user_privacy_setting ups on ups.user_id = fr.friend_user_id left join friend_group fg on fg.id = fr.group_id and fg.user_id = fr.user_id left join study_team_member tm_self on tm_self.user_id = fr.user_id and tm_self.status = 1 left join study_team_member tm_friend on tm_friend.user_id = fr.friend_user_id and tm_friend.status = 1 where fr.user_id = #{userId} order by same_team_flag desc, group_name asc, u.nickname asc, u.user_no asc
mapper.insert: insert into friend_relation (user_id, friend_user_id, group_id) values (#{userId}, #{friendUserId}, #{groupId})
mapper.select: select * from friend_request where id = #{requestId} limit 1

select fr.id, fr.requester_user_id, fr.target_user_id, fr.request_message, fr.status, fr.create_time, fr.update_time, u.id as counterpart_user_id, u.user_no as counterpart_user_no, u.nickname as counterpart_nickname, coalesce(u.avatar_url, '') as counterpart_avatar_url, case when tm_self.team_id is not null and tm_self.team_id = tm_other.team_id then 1 else 0 end as same_team_flag from friend_request fr inner join app_user u on u.id = fr.requester_user_id and u.status = 1 left join study_team_member tm_self on tm_self.user_id = fr.target_user_id and tm_self.status = 1 left join study_team_member tm_other on tm_other.user_id = fr.requester_user_id and tm_other.status = 1 where fr.target_user_id = #{userId} and fr.status = 'pending' order by fr.create_time desc, fr.id desc

select fr.id, fr.requester_user_id, fr.target_user_id, fr.request_message, fr.status, fr.create_time, fr.update_time, u.id as counterpart_user_id, u.user_no as counterpart_user_no, u.nickname as counterpart_nickname, coalesce(u.avatar_url, '') as counterpart_avatar_url, case when tm_self.team_id is not null and tm_self.team_id = tm_other.team_id then 1 else 0 end as same_team_flag from friend_request fr inner join app_user u on u.id = fr.target_user_id and u.status = 1 left join study_team_member tm_self on tm_self.user_id = fr.requester_user_id and tm_self.status = 1 left join study_team_member tm_other on tm_other.user_id = fr.target_user_id and tm_other.status = 1 where fr.requester_user_id = #{userId} and fr.status = 'pending' order by fr.create_time desc, fr.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into friend_request ( requester_user_id, target_user_id, request_message, status, create_time ) values ( #{requesterUserId}, #{targetUserId}, #{requestMessage}, #{status}, #{createTime} )
mapper.delete: delete from friend_request where (requester_user_id = #{userId} and target_user_id = #{otherUserId}) or (requester_user_id = #{otherUserId} and target_user_id = #{userId})
mapper.select: select u.id as user_id, u.user_no, u.nickname, coalesce(u.avatar_url, '') as avatar_url, case when fr.id is null then 0 else 1 end as already_friend_flag, case when outgoing_req.id is null then 0 else 1 end as outgoing_pending_flag, case when incoming_req.id is null then 0 else 1 end as incoming_pending_flag, case when black_self.id is null then 0 else 1 end as blocked_by_me_flag, case when black_other.id is null then 0 else 1 end as blocked_me_flag, case when tm_self.team_id is not null and tm_self.team_id = tm_other.team_id then 1 else 0 end as same_team_flag from app_user u left join friend_relation fr on fr.user_id = #{userId} and fr.friend_user_id = u.id left join friend_request outgoing_req on outgoing_req.requester_user_id = #{userId} and outgoing_req.target_user_id = u.id and outgoing_req.status = 'pending' left join friend_request incoming_req on incoming_req.requester_user_id = u.id and incoming_req.target_user_id = #{userId} and incoming_req.status = 'pending' left join user_blacklist black_self on black_self.user_id = #{userId} and black_self.blocked_user_id = u.id left join user_blacklist black_other on black_other.user_id = u.id and black_other.blocked_user_id = #{userId} left join study_team_member tm_self on tm_self.user_id = #{userId} and tm_self.status = 1 left join study_team_member tm_other on tm_other.user_id = u.id and tm_other.status = 1 where u.status = 1 and u.id <> #{userId} and ( u.user_no like #{keywordLike} or u.nickname like #{keywordLike} ) order by case when u.user_no = #{exactKeyword} then 0 when u.nickname = #{exactKeyword} then 1 else 2 end, same_team_flag desc, already_friend_flag asc, u.last_login_time desc, u.id desc limit 20
